items.title: The Retail Trading Boom Is Back. Charles Schwab Is Quietly Cashing In.
items.summary: Charles Schwab is benefiting significantly from the retail trading boom despite being an established player in the discount brokerage industry. The company reported $13.1 trillion in customer assets in May 2026, with 27% year-over-year growth, 461,000 new accounts (up 37%), and record daily trading volumes of 11.8 million trades. With a P/E ratio of 19x compared to Robinhood's 54x, Schwab offers attractive valuation while capturing growth from increased trading activity and margin loans.
